title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
We at Walker Chandiok are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
